description: Product Description Treasure away your precious moments and delightful gifts with the various shredded paper from Emartbuy. These shredded paper enhance the mood and complement the presents. They are artistically designed and very resourceful. These keep your surprise safe and ready to be gifted to someone special. Quality Packaging Filler Impress any gift recipient with this pretty shredded filling in any gift box, complete with shredded paper fill inside and make it a special gift. Excellent Decoration These are beautifully designed to add charm to your gifts. They are functional and extremely fashionable. You can use these shreds for basket filling, wine box filler, gift packaging, and wrapping, or other fillers. Complement's the Gift These colorful shredded paper make it more convenient to pack your gifts and also provide more space for the present. The box gives an eye-catching complement to your gift. You can use the shredded paper for beautifully decorating your gift package, suitable for various occasions such as birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Easter, and more.
